commit_scope: Move BML balanced-brace method body collection from an opaque recursive list walker to an explicit cursor/depth/accumulator state-step representation.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-brace-state-step-proof.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-cursor-body-span-proof.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk
local_validation.notes: The first state-runner wiring exposed a large-body stall because token cursors recomputed rest with drop at every step. The cursor now carries its rest list directly, so production BMF-grammar.bml body preservation remains green.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML method-body collection is now visible as a sequential state transition over cursor, depth, accumulated body tokens, rest, and step count. Existing parser callers keep the same body/rest API.
test_flows: python3 scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py before commit to prove no new BML/BMF host-native semantics were introduced.

phase_gate.reason: This removes one recursive body-collection construct from the BML grammar surface by making it an explicit state machine. Full thesis parity still requires BML expression/control-flow lowering and BMF rule execution from the known-working companion code.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk now defines bml-source-brace-collect-state and bml-source-brace-collect-step.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-brace-state-step-proof.fk proves nested brace collection, rest preservation, and step count.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk proves the production parser still preserves original BMF-grammar.bml method bodies.
